channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Shakira Adds Five New US Shows to “Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran World Tour”
item.description: Shake it with Shakira! 🌟 Just announced: 5 new US tour dates added! Who's ready to dance all night long? 💃🎶 #ShakiraTourAnnouncement

item.title: Bebe Rexha Celebrates Topping Two Dance Charts After Going Independent
item.description: 🎉 Bebe Rexha kicking butt and taking names on the dance charts! Independent queen 👑 #MusicMonday #BebeRexha #DanceMusic

item.title: Charli XCX, Lorde, Twenty One Pilots Lead 2026 Austin City Limits Fest
item.description: 🌟 Let's dance in Austin! Charli XCX, Lorde, Twenty One Pilots headline ACL Fest 2026 🎶 Who's ready? 🎉 #ACL2026

item.title: Dave Matthews Band & St. Vincent Cover Talking Heads At Riverbeat Music Festival
item.description: 🎶 Dave Matthews Band and St. Vincent bring the funk with a killer Talking Heads cover at Riverbeat Music Festival! 🙌 #MusicMagic

item.title: Jason Isbell Reuniting With Drive-By Truckers At Shoals Fest
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to rock as Jason Isbell joins Drive-By Truckers at Shoals Fest! A reunion you won't want to miss! 🎶 #MusicNews #ShoalsFest

item.title: Watch Sabrina Carpenter and Stevie Nicks Perform ‘Landslide’ at the Met Gala
item.description: 🎶✨ When two queens collide! Sabrina Carpenter and Stevie Nicks slay ‘Landslide’ at the Met Gala. Watch now! #MusicRoyalty #MetGalaMagic 🎸👑

item.title: Tour news: Ninajirachi, Dolly Parton, Todd Terje, The Fleshtones, Northwest Hardcore Fest, Wailin Storms, more
item.description: 🚌 On the road again! 🎶 Exciting tour news featuring some of your faves like Dolly Parton and more! #MusicNews 🎉

item.title: Bring Me the Horizon’s Rise to Arena Headliner on Full Display at Madison Square Garden Show: Review, Photos + Video
item.description: 🔥 Rock on, Bring Me the Horizon! 🎸🤘 From club stages to MSG, they're taking over arenas! Check out the epic review, pics, and vid! #BMTH

item.title: Ninajirachi Plots 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🚀 Ninajirachi is taking her beats across North America in 2026! Who's ready to dance the night away?! 💃🎶 #NinajirachiTour2026

item.title: Hayley Williams, Mitski, Ethel Cain Set for All Things Go Festival 2026
item.description: 🌟 Dream lineup alert! 🌟 Get ready for an epic music experience at All Things Go Festival 2026 with Hayley Williams, Mitski, and Ethel Cain! 🎶 #MusicFestivalGoals

item.title: Bruce Springsteen’s Philadelphia Concert Postponed by 76ers, Flyers’ Playoff Victories
item.description: 🎸 Springsteen's Philly show gets a game-time delay! 🏀🏒 Looks like the Boss will have to wait for the champs to finish their victory dance! 🎶 #RockandRollDelay

item.title: Islands’ Nick Thorburn and Ratata’s Mike Stroud Join Forces as The Creem, Unveil Debut Songs: Stream
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to groove with The Creem! 🕺🎸 Islands' Nick Thorburn and Ratata's Mike Stroud bring the heat with their debut songs. Stream now! 🔥 #TheCreem #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Shakira’s Free Concert Draws 2 Million to Rio De Janeiro’s Copacabana Beach
item.description: Shakira rocked Copacabana Beach with 2 million fans 🎶🏖️ What a party, what a vibe! #ShakiraInRio

item.title: Sugar roared back to life at their first show in 31 years (Webster Hall Night 1 full video, pics, setlist)
item.description: Sugar came back swinging at their first show in 31 years! 🎸🔥 Watch the full video and see the setlist now! #SugarBandRevival 💥

item.title: Watch Olivia Rodrigo Perform New Song With Weyes Blood on SNL
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo and Weyes Blood = dream team on SNL! 🌟✨ Watch this epic collab now! #MusicMagic #SNLJam

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Performs New Track ‘begged’ in ‘SNL’ Hosting Debut
item.description: 🎤 Olivia Rodrigo rocked the stage with 'begged' on SNL! 🌟 Who else is loving her new track? #OliviaRodrigo #SNLPerformance 🎶

item.title: Gracie Abrams Announces New Song ‘Hit the Wall’
item.description: New vibes incoming! 🎶 Gracie Abrams drops 'Hit the Wall' - get ready to groove! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Charli xcx Shares ‘Rock Music’ Song Teaser, Says She’s Not Making a Rock Album
item.description: 🤘 Charli xcx is shaking things up with a 'Rock Music' teaser 🎸 Who's ready for this new sound? 🎶 #CharliXCX #MusicNews

item.title: BTS at Stanford Stadium: How to Get Last-Minute Tickets
item.description: 🚀 Score last-minute tix to the epic BTS show at Stanford Stadium! Don't miss out on this K-pop extravaganza! 🎶 #BTS #StanfordStadium #KpopFever

item.title: Wheel Of Fortune Announces New Action Bronson Album Planet Frog Out Next Week
item.description: 🐸🌟 Get ready to hop into action! @ActionBronson's new album Planet Frog drops next week! Let's vibe together! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Barry Manilow Postpones May Las Vegas Shows Amid Cancer Recovery
item.description: Sending love and healing vibes to Barry Manilow 💖 Wishing him a speedy recovery! 🌟 #BarryManilow #GetWellSoon

item.title: Record Store Day 2026’s Top Sellers: Taylor Swift, Pink Floyd, Bruno Mars & More
item.description: 🎶 Vinyl vibes for days! 🌟 Taylor Swift, Pink Floyd, Bruno Mars, and more topping the charts at Record Store Day 2026! 🎉 #VinylRevival

item.title: Post Malone Postpones Start of Stadium Tour with Jelly Roll, Cancels Several Dates Outright
item.description: Post Malone pumpin' the breaks on tour plans 🚌🛑 Wishing him a quick comeback to the stage! 🎤✨ #PostponedNotCanceled

item.title: Ice Spice Stars in Spicy Wendy’s Ad Following McDonald’s Scuffle: Watch
item.description: 🌟 Spice up your day with Ice Spice in this sizzling Wendy’s ad! 🔥 Watch the spicy showdown now! 🍔🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: Lady Gaga Shares More The Devil Wears Prada 2 Songs, “Shape Of A Woman” & “Glamorous Life”
item.description: 🔥 Lady Gaga drops two new tracks for The Devil Wears Prada 2: "Shape Of A Woman" & "Glamorous Life"! 🎶✨ #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Love On The Spectrum Stars Are Breaking Into The Music World
item.description: 🎶 Love is in the air and on the charts! 🌟 Get ready to groove with the stars of Love On The Spectrum! 🎤 #MusicNews #LoveOnTheSpectrum

item.title: Slayyyter adds new shows to tour, NYC & LA included
item.description: Slayyyter is taking over NYC and LA! 🌟 Mark your calendars for a pop extravaganza near you! 🎉 #SlayyyterOnTour

item.title: Foo Fighters Serve Up Blood, Guts, and Rock and Roll in New Zombie-Filled ‘Spit Shine’ Video
item.description: 🎸🧟‍♂️ Get ready to rock out and scream with the new @foofighters music video! Zombies + music = epicness! #RockOn #FooFighters 🤘

item.title: Lizzy Rain Wins First WWE NXT Match with Iron Maiden Scream and AC/DC-Inspired Finisher: Watch
item.description: 🔥 Rocking her way to victory! Lizzy Rain nails her WWE debut with an Iron Maiden scream and AC/DC-inspired move! 🎸 #MusicMeetsWrestling

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Sets Unraveled Tour Dates
item.description: 🚀 Olivia Rodrigo unleashes tour dates! Let's dance, scream, and sing our hearts out together! 💃🎶 #livemusic #OliviaRodrigo
